units.source_text: DLC ASIA LIMITED ANNUAL REPORT 2025/26 8
Management Discussion and Analysis
CAPITAL COMMITMENT

As at 31 March 2026, the Group did not have any capital commitment (31 March 2025: HK$Nil) in respect of the acquisitions of property and equipment contracted for but not provided in the Consolidated Financial Statements.
SIGNIFICANT INVESTMENT
As at 31 March 2026, the Group had no significant investment with a value of 5% or more of the Group’s total assets.
EVENT AFTER THE REPORTING DATE
There was no significant event relevant to the business or financial performance of the Group that has come to the attention of the Directors after the FY2026 and up to the date of this report.
FUTURE PLANS FOR MATERIAL INVESTMENTS AND CAPITAL ASSETS
As at 31 March 2026, the Group did not have any future plans for material investments and capital assets.
MATERIAL ACQUISITIONS AND DISPOSALS OF SUBSIDIARIES, ASSOCIATES AND JOINT VENTURES
During the FY2026, the Group did not have any material acquisitions or disposals of subsidiaries, associates and joint ventures.
CONTINGENT LIABILITIES
As at 31 March 2026 and 31 March 2025, the Group did not have any material contingent liabilities.
EXPOSURE TO EXCHANGE RATE FLUCTUATIONS
The Group’s revenue generating operations are mainly transacted in HK$ and US$. The Directors consider the impact of foreign exchange exposure to the Group to be minimal.
PLEDGE OF ASSETS
As at 31 March 2026 and 31 March 2025, the Group did not pledge any of its assets.
EMPLOYEES AND REMUNERATION POLICIES

As at 31 March 2026, the Group had 27 staff (as at 31 March 2025: 27) in total. The Group’s remuneration policy is based on the duties, responsibilities, experiences, skills, time commitment and performance of the relevant director or member of senior management of the Group and are made with reference to those paid by comparable companies. The employees are remunerated with monthly salaries and discretionary bonuses based on individual performance, market performance, the Group’s profit as a whole and comparable market levels. Apart from salary payments, other staff benefits include provident fund contributions, medical insurance coverage, other allowances and benefits.

fixed_translations.translated_text: DLC ASIA LIMITED 2025/26 年报 8
管理层讨论及分析
资本承担
截至2026年3月31日，本集团并无就已订约但未在综合财务报表中拨备的物业及设备收购承担任何资本承担（2025年3月31日：零港元）。
重大投资
截至2026年3月31日，本集团并无价值占本集团总资产5%或以上的重大投资。
报告期后事项
于2026财政年度后直至本报告日期，董事并无注意到任何与本集团业务或财务表现有关的重大事项。
重大投资及资本资产的未来计划
截至2026年3月31日，本集团并无任何重大投资及资本资产的未来计划。
附属公司、联营公司及合营企业的重大收购及出售
于2026财政年度，本集团并无任何附属公司、联营公司及合营企业的重大收购或出售。
或然负债
截至2026年3月31日及2025年3月31日，本集团并无任何重大或然负债。
汇率波动风险
本集团产生收益的业务主要以港元及美元进行交易。董事认为外汇风险对本集团的影响轻微。
资产抵押
截至2026年3月31日及2025年3月31日，本集团并无抵押任何资产。
雇员及薪酬政策
截至2026年3月31日，本集团共有27名员工（截至2025年3月31日：27名）。本集团的薪酬政策以本集团有关董事或高级管理人员的职务、责任、经验、技能、投入时间及表现为基础，并参考可比公司支付的薪酬。雇员按月领取薪金，并根据个人表现、市场表现、本集团整体利润及可比市场水平获得酌情花红。除薪金外，其他员工福利包括公积金供款、医疗保险以及其他津贴和福利。
